Our Journey

A Journey of Consistent Growth and Discipline

Established in 2004, MMPS was built to provide structured High School education under the State syllabus. Over time, it evolved into one of the largest and most disciplined High School institutions in the region, today serving 750+ students

Over the years, the school has maintained 14 consecutive years of 100% result in the State Board examination, reflecting disciplined academic monitoring and structured execution.

"The journey of MMPS has never been limited to board results alone."

Parallel to academic consistency, the institution has steadily built a culture of competitive exposure — especially in sports, where students are identified early, trained systematically, and encouraged to participate beyond campus boundaries.

From Foundation to Measured Excellence

2004

MMPS Established

Mariyumma Memorial Public School founded under the ERAM Educational & Welfare Trust to provide structured High School education under the State syllabus.

2008

Structured Academic Systems Embedded

Categorized student attention, internal assessments, and targeted revision modules become core to daily academic delivery across all grades.

2012

Sports Development Pathway Introduced

Early sports identification and structured training programs introduced — creating a parallel development track alongside academics.

2018

Shreshtta Initiative & Leadership Programs

The Shreshtta classroom development initiative launched. JCI & Rotary Junior Wing, STEM Clubs, and Scout & Guide programs formalised across the institution.

2026

National Sports Selections & 14-Year Record

Students selected to FIFA Talent Academy, Kerala State Football Team, and Punjab FC. 14 consecutive years of 100% board results sustained.

Academic Structure

An Integrated AcademicAthleticEcosystem.

MMPS prepares students for board examinations through structured academic planning, with a curriculum structure that allows flexibility while maintaining consistent academic monitoring. Students are guided progressively from foundational years through board examination stages.


Continuous Progress Tracking

Regular assessments & structured monitoring

Competitive Sports Exposure

Early identification & systematic training

Leadership & Civic Platforms

JCI, Rotary Junior Wing, Scout & Guide

Academic Support Systems

Categorized student attention by performance level

Regular internal assessments across all grades

Supervised academic monitoring daily

Targeted question practice modules

Shreshtta classroom development initiative

Exam-focused revision & support modules

Timely academic announcements & notices

Coordinated parent communication system

Our Head Master

RAKESH
C

Head Master · MMPS

Institutional Strengths

Academic Strength, Competitive Exposure, Monitoring & Coordination

MMPS functions on structured daily supervision and consistent communication systems — ensuring no student's progress goes unmonitored and every parent stays informed in real time.

  • Continuous academic progress tracking
  • Structured daily attendance monitoring
  • Coordinated parent communication
  • Shreshtta classroom development initiative
  • STEM clubs & sports club engagement
  • JCI & Rotary Junior Wing leadership exposure
  • State-level program hosting & representation
  • Nalla Naalekkaayi youth development initiative

No student goes unnoticed. No parent remains uninformed.

MMPS Parent Communication Channel

Today · 9:15 AM · Sports Development

📋 Sports Update: Mohammed Sinan (Gr. 10) has been officially selected to the FIFA Talent Academy, Odisha. Congratulations!

Today · 7:05 AM · Attendance System

✅Attendance: Your ward was present today. Morning study session attendance: 100%.

Yesterday · 4:30 PM · Academic Monitoring

📣 Shreshtta Initiative: Grade 8 classroom performance review completed. Results shared with respective parents.

2 days ago · School Management

🏆Recognition: Fathima Mehrin (Gr. 7) — Gold Medal, 4th Kerala State Sambo Championship 2026!

Early Pathways
to Higher Performance

Academic consistency at MMPS is matched by active participation in competitive platforms, particularly in football and athletics. Our students actively represent the school across competitive platforms.

Institutional Benchmarks

Academic Record

14 Consecutive Years — 100% Higher Secondary Results

A sustained record of complete pass results, maintained through disciplined academic systems, structured student monitoring, and exam-focused revision cycles

Sports Development

Academic Strength & Athletic Development — Hand in Hand

Students identified early, trained systematically, and supported to compete at state and national levels — from FIFA Talent Academy to Kerala State Football selections.

Communication Portal

Structured Academic Coordination.

Academic coordination and administrative communication extend through the unified ERAM Student & Parent Portal. Students and parents access fee systems, academic resources, and campus-wide updates through a single, centralised interface.

Designed to ensure clarity, accountability, and timely communication across the entire ERAM ecosystem.

/01

Academic Monitoring

Real-time progress tracking across all subjects

/02

Attendance Updates

Daily attendance communicated directly to parents

/03

Grade-level Notices

Grade and activity-specific announcements & circulars

/04

Extended Access

Available across all 5 ERAM institutions

Begin the Journey at MMPS.

Admissions are now open at Mariyumma Memorial Public School. Join an institution with a proven record of academic excellence, structured athletic development, and 14 consecutive years of 100% board results.
